purpose: First-pass source-unit manifest under strict no-skip responsibility rules. Existing mapped/status-only closure is not completion evidence.
rules: Do not count mapped/status-only/source-file-review rows as completed.
Every unit must be implemented-verified, approved-excluded, blocked, or scope-redesign-required.
Completed requires source evidence, runtime consumer evidence, and verification evidence tied to this unit.
notes: 135 runtime feature rows are completion candidates; 39 mapped rows are not completed.
